name: Bottled Screams
description:
Activate (1 Action) envision

The vengeful wails of a revenant, barely contained in this rattling jar, infuse your magic with all of their spite and malice. If a target fails its saving throw against your Seal Fate spell after you've added this catalyst, it takes 1d6 persistent of the type chosen for the spell (2d6 persistent if it critically fails).
